metadata.description: A swarm of automated Claude Code agents for knowledge capture, career growth, and team productivity

plugins.name: knowledge-base-system
plugins.description: Automated knowledge capture with memory and promotion evidence tracking

plugins.name: ci-babysitter
plugins.description: Monitor and auto-retry CI builds with smart failure detection

plugins.name: kibana-testing-tools
plugins.description: Comprehensive testing and QA automation for Kibana - coverage analysis, test generation, flake detection, and Scout/Cypress migration

plugins.name: kibana-code-quality-suite
plugins.description: Automated code quality, security, and accessibility reviews for Kibana with TypeScript healing and refactoring assistance

plugins.name: kibana-dev-workflow-tools
plugins.description: Streamlined development workflow automation - Git operations, PR optimization, OpenSpec guidance, and code archaeology

plugins.name: kibana-build-performance-tools
plugins.description: Performance optimization, bundle analysis, and dependency management automation for Kibana

plugins.name: kibana-docs-release-tools
plugins.description: Automated documentation generation, release notes creation, and migration planning for Kibana releases

plugins.name: kibana-infrastructure-ops-tools
plugins.description: Infrastructure and operations automation - monitoring setup, cross-repo synchronization, and i18n management

plugins.name: kibana-career-development
plugins.description: Career progression tracking and promotion evidence capture for Kibana developers

plugins.name: elastic-agent-builder-skill-dev
plugins.description: Development toolkit for building, testing, and optimizing Elastic Agent Builder skills — collision detection, eval generation, self-improving loops, trace analysis, and multi-model compatibility
